gap_or_risk: Single-page catalog alone can limit crawl depth for a large product set.
implemented_fix: Generated static product pages, category pages, sitemap.xml, robots.txt and canonical URLs.
remaining_action: Replace SITE_BASE_URL with the real deployed domain before production.

gap_or_risk: Product-rich results need valid Product/Offer markup.
implemented_fix: Added JSON-LD Product markup to every product page.
remaining_action: Validate samples with Rich Results Test after deployment.

gap_or_risk: Pure JS product rendering can delay indexing and reduce crawl reliability.
implemented_fix: Created crawlable HTML product/category pages while keeping JS catalog for shopping UX.
remaining_action: Submit sitemap in Google Search Console.

gap_or_risk: Titles/descriptions must be unique and descriptive at page level.
implemented_fix: Generated SEO titles, descriptions, canonical links and OG/Twitter tags.
remaining_action: Manually rewrite top revenue product titles for stronger conversion.

gap_or_risk: AI/answer engines need concise product facts and FAQ-style answers.
implemented_fix: Added answer engine summary blocks, FAQ page, FAQ schema and product facts.
remaining_action: Add brand FAQs, warranty, payment methods and human support hours.

implemented_fix: Added Pakistan delivery intent and editable geo fields in CSV.
remaining_action: Add actual cities served, delivery times and warehouse address if public.

gap_or_risk: Some rows can have missing/weak image alt text.
implemented_fix: Generated image alt tags and product image galleries.
remaining_action: Replace missing images and compress large assets via CDN.

gap_or_risk: Video URLs existed but were not surfaced.
implemented_fix: Product pages include video links and VideoObject markup when available.
remaining_action: Host videos with thumbnails and upload dates for richer eligibility.

gap_or_risk: Customers need guided help on large catalogs.
implemented_fix: Added iframe chatbot page and floating JavaScript widget.
remaining_action: Connect optional AI backend if you want real LLM answers.

gap_or_risk: Large product tables are hard to browse.
implemented_fix: Added cards, filters, voice search, image-assisted search, CSV export and product tables.
